title: Module Summary: Introduction to Clinical Trichology
description: Condensed module summary: physician-led scope, dermatology/transplant interfaces, responsibilities, evidence tiers (1–4), ethics, and red flags — derived from Volume 1 manual Module 1. PDF distributed to enrolled learners when released.

title: Module Summary: Hair Follicle Biology and Scalp Science
description: Condensed module summary: embryology, follicle anatomy, bulge/stem niches, cycling, shaft, scalp environment, ethnic variation, aging — from Volume 1 manual Module 2. PDF distributed when released.

title: Module Summary: Molecular and Hormonal Regulation
description: Condensed module summary: androgen biology, Wnt/prostaglandins, growth mediators, microinflammation, female heterogeneity, treatment logic — from Volume 1 manual Module 3. PDF distributed when released.

title: Module Summary: Consultation and History-Taking
description: Condensed module summary: complaint translation, tempo/pattern, female endocrine history, triggers, red flags, psychosocial context, structured template, documentation — from Volume 1 manual Module 4. PDF distributed when released.

title: Lesson Summary: Scope and Definition of Clinical Trichology
description: Lesson digest: scope of clinical trichology, process classification, longitudinal care framing (manual 1.1, 1.3).

title: Lesson Summary: Discipline Boundaries and Interfaces
description: Lesson digest: dermatology reference standards vs hair surgery; downstream sequencing (manual 1.2).

title: Lesson Summary: Doctor Roles Within Hair Restoration Medicine
description: Lesson digest: physician responsibilities; ethics, consent, marketing boundaries (manual 1.3, 1.5 preview).

title: Lesson Summary: Evidence Principles and Standards-Led Practice
description: Lesson digest: evidence tiers 1–4; ethics, consent, red-flag referral list (manual 1.4–1.5).

title: Lesson Summary: Follicular Unit Anatomy
description: Lesson digest: embryology signals; infundibulum, isthmus, bulge, bulb; dermal papilla (manual 2.1–2.2).

title: Lesson Summary: Hair Cycle Biology
description: Lesson digest: anagen, catagen, telogen, exogen, kenogen; clinical correlates (manual 2.5).

title: Lesson Summary: Scalp Environment and Barrier Science
description: Lesson digest: shaft layers; scalp barrier, microbiome, mechanical exposures; breakage vs alopecia (manual 2.4, 2.6).

title: Lesson Summary: Follicular Unit Microanatomy in Clinical Practice
description: Lesson digest: bulge/stem niche and scarring; ethnic variation; aging biology (manual 2.3, 2.7–2.8).

title: Lesson Summary: Molecular Signaling Pathways in Hair Cycling
description: Lesson digest: Wnt/beta-catenin; prostaglandin balance in AGA signalling (manual 3.3–3.4).

title: Lesson Summary: Androgen Biology and Follicular Response
description: Lesson digest: DHT pathway, receptor genetics, age of activation (manual 3.1–3.2).

title: Lesson Summary: Inflammatory and Immune Mediators
description: Lesson digest: perifollicular microinflammation, fibrosis, scalp symptoms (manual 3.6).

title: Lesson Summary: Systemic and Metabolic Modifiers
description: Lesson digest: female endocrine heterogeneity; treatment sequencing logic (manual 3.7–3.8).

title: Lesson Summary: Consultation Framework for Hair Loss Practice
description: Lesson digest: complaint categories; structured consultation domains (manual 4.1, 4.8).

title: Lesson Summary: Structured Hair Loss History-Taking
description: Lesson digest: tempo, pattern, female history, family, drugs, triggers (manual 4.2–4.6).

title: Lesson Summary: Red-Flag Recognition and Escalation
description: Lesson digest: red-flag history; psychosocial burden vs clinical standards (manual 4.6–4.7).

title: Lesson Summary: Initial Clinical Reasoning and Triage
description: Lesson digest: history-first differentials; documentation of uncertainty; triage (manual 4.8–4.9).
